---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that doesn't work as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened / Kva skjedde

A clear, short description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce / Steg for å gjenta

1. Open `floorplanify.html` in …
2. Click …
3. …

## Expected behaviour / Forventa åtferd

What you thought should happen.

## Screenshots / Skjermbilete

If applicable, add screenshots or short clips to help explain.

## Environment / Miljø

- Browser: Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge (version)
- OS: Windows / macOS / Linux
- File: single HTML or the size of your JSON plan

## Extra context / Ekstra kontekst

Anything else that might be relevant (e.g. a saved JSON plan that
triggers the issue).
